name: BUY ME A CANDY BAR!
description:
At the grocery store, Judy screams at her mom Amy to buy her a candy car. Amy refuses b/c it is unhealthy, w/ Judy throwing grocery items, calling her mom stupid, rolling on the floor, saying she will stop once she gets her candy bar.

Amy is ashamed of being such a weak mom that she can't control Judy, w/ Amy stammering Judy to stop, and Judy getting more and more loud and out of control.

Will you intervene or do you just keep your head down and continue shopping?
creator: VRCat
